title: NovaTel Wireless — Approved Source Content Assets
description: Source marketing materials from which channel-specific content is adapted. Each asset may contain compliance issues that the SignalGuard review agents should catch.

assets.title: NovaTel Summer Switch Campaign — Source One-Pager
assets.source_content:
Summer Switch to NovaTel — Get the Fastest 5G and a Free iPhone 17 Pro

It's time to make the switch. NovaTel has the fastest 5G network in America, and right now, you can get a FREE iPhone 17 Pro when you switch from your old carrier.

Why NovaTel?
• Fastest 5G speeds — up to 4 Gbps download
• Truly unlimited data — no caps, no throttling, period
• The best customer service in wireless

The Deal: Trade in any phone — even an old flip phone — and walk away with a brand-new iPhone 17 Pro for $0. Plus, we'll give you a $200 Visa card just for switching. That's over $1,200 in value, guaranteed.

No strings attached. No hidden fees. No catch.

Switch today and save 25% vs. what you're paying now. Most customers see savings from day one.

Ready? Click here or visit your nearest NovaTel store.
claims_made: Truly unlimited data — no caps, no throttling

known_violations_for_eval.issue: 'up to 4 Gbps' — peak theoretical, no methodology cited
'truly unlimited — no throttling' — Unlimited Starter IS deprioritized
'any phone' — only select brands qualify for full credit

assets.title: NovaTel Family Plan Value Proposition — Offer Sheet
assets.source_content:
NovaTel Unlimited Family Plan — Scalable Connectivity for Household Multi-Device Ecosystems

Configuring your family's wireless infrastructure shouldn't require a dedicated IT resource. NovaTel's Unlimited Starter multi-line solution delivers robust network connectivity across all household endpoints at an industry-leading per-unit cost basis.

Key Value Drivers:
• 4 lines at $25/line/mo (aggregate monthly: $100 with AutoPay enrollment)
• Unlimited data throughput with QoS-managed deprioritization thresholds
• 5GB per-line mobile hotspot allocation with graceful degradation
• Full 5G NR access across NovaTel's nationwide deployment footprint
• Seamless onboarding — zero migration downtime

Enterprise-Grade Reliability, Consumer-Friendly Pricing:
NovaTel leverages a dense small-cell deployment architecture augmented by mid-band spectrum holdings to deliver consistent sub-20ms latency and median download speeds exceeding 200 Mbps nationwide (internal network monitoring, Q1 2026).

ROI Analysis: A family of 4 switching from comparable carrier plans saves an estimated $480/year. This calculation factors in NovaTel's bundled streaming value ($15.99/mo) and waived activation for port-in customers.

Optimize your family's connectivity. Schedule a consultation or visit novatel.com/family.

known_violations_for_eval.issue: Tone completely wrong — written for technical/enterprise audience, target is Consumer General
'200 Mbps' from internal monitoring — not independent source
'$480/year savings' — comparison includes streaming value, not disclosed clearly
Needs massive simplification for consumer audience — jargon-heavy

assets.title: BOGO Holiday Campaign — Creative Messaging
assets.source_content:
🎄 HOLIDAY BLOWOUT! BUY ONE iPHONE 17, GET ONE ABSOLUTELY FREE! 🎄

THIS IS NOT A DRILL! 🚨

NovaTel's BIGGEST deal of the year is HERE and it WON'T LAST. Get TWO iPhone 17s for the price of ONE. That's right — the second phone is 100% FREE. No strings attached. No catch. No joke.

🔥 UNBEATABLE VALUE:
• Two iPhone 17s — over $1,800 in phones for just $899
• America's #1 rated 5G network
• Unlimited everything — data, talk, text, the works
• FREE overnight shipping — get them before Christmas!

⏰ HURRY — LIMITED TIME ONLY! This offer ends when inventory runs out. Don't be the person who misses out. Your family deserves the best, and NovaTel delivers. GUARANTEED.

💥 ACT NOW: Click here to claim your BOGO deal before they're gone!

NovaTel — The Revolutionary Leader in Wireless

known_violations_for_eval.issue: Multiple urgency violations: 'NOT A DRILL', 'HURRY', 'LIMITED TIME ONLY', 'ACT NOW', 'won't last'
BOGO: no disclosure of new line req, bill credits, 36-mo installment, early cancel penalty, activation fee
Tone is aggressive and pushy — violates brand voice

assets.title: 5G Home Internet Launch — Press Release Draft
assets.source_content:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

NovaTel Launches Game-Changing 5G Home Internet — Starting at Just $25/mo

DALLAS, TX — July 15, 2026 — NovaTel Wireless today announced the nationwide rollout of its disruptive 5G Home Internet service, delivering blazing-fast speeds to homes across America at an industry-leading price point.

Starting at just $25 per month, NovaTel 5G Home Internet empowers households to ditch their legacy cable or DSL connections and experience truly unlimited home broadband with no data caps and no annual contracts.

"This is the future of home connectivity," said Sarah Chen, NovaTel Chief Marketing Officer. "We're leveraging our extensive 5G infrastructure to bring affordable, high-speed internet to communities that have been underserved by traditional ISPs."

Key highlights:
• Download speeds up to 1 Gbps
• No data caps or throttling
• No annual contract — cancel anytime
• Self-install in under 15 minutes
• Available in 200+ markets at launch

NovaTel's 5G Home Internet represents a paradigm shift in residential broadband, seamlessly replacing legacy wired connections with next-generation wireless performance.

The service is available starting today. Visit novatel.com/home to check availability.

About NovaTel Wireless
NovaTel Wireless is America's fastest-growing wireless carrier, serving over 50 million customers with award-winning 5G coverage across 300+ cities.

Media Contact: press@novatel.com

known_violations_for_eval.issue: 'starting at $25/mo' — requires eligible phone plan bundle, standalone is $50/mo
'up to 1 Gbps' — typical is 72-245 Mbps per offer registry
Press release has informal CTA-like language; should end with 'For more information' format
Implied nationwide coverage — service is in 200+ markets, not nationwide

assets.title: Student Back-to-School Campaign — Event Brief
assets.source_content:
🎓 STUDENTS: Half-Off Unlimited for Your Entire College Career! 🎓

Hey there! 👋 College is expensive enough — your phone plan shouldn't be.

NovaTel's Student Unlimited plan gives you EVERYTHING for just $37.99/mo:
• Unlimited data, talk, and text
• 30GB hotspot so you can work from literally anywhere
• Access to NovaTel's robust 5G network on campus and beyond

That's 50% off our regular price. For FOUR YEARS. No joke.

And here's the best part — no contracts, no activation fees, no BS. Just fast, reliable wireless that works as hard as you do.

Your parents are still paying for Verizon's overpriced garbage tier? Tell them to chill. You've got this.

Pro tip: Stack this with our BOGO deal and get your roommate on NovaTel too. Synergy! 🤝

Sign up in 2 minutes flat → novatel.com/student

Limited spots available — ACT NOW before your campus allocation fills up!

known_violations_for_eval.issue: No disclosure that price reverts to $75.99/mo after 48 months or if verification fails
References competitor (Verizon) by name dismissively — violates humor policy
Tone too casual/flippant for brand voice ('no BS', 'Tell them to chill')
'Limited spots available' — may be false scarcity if not provably true
